task_objective: Review public documentation, add repository and third-party attribution, and align the project license with the permissive licenses of the retained template and project-authored code.
tests_added: Project license metadata must remain MIT in package.json and pyproject.toml.
NOTICE must exist as a required repository and Decky package file.
The ZIP validator must reject archives that omit NOTICE.
design_decisions: License project-authored SDH-Ludusavi code under MIT and retain the Decky plugin template BSD-3-Clause notice in LICENSE.
Use NOTICE to distinguish template lineage, vendored source, frontend dependencies, runtime/API integrations, and artwork provenance without relicensing third-party work.
Keep the vendored pyludusavi MIT license in its existing dist-info location and require both LICENSE and NOTICE in every Decky ZIP.
Use a version-neutral GitHub release URL in README so installation documentation does not become stale after each release.
State explicitly that SteamGridDB artwork is not covered by the project MIT license.

results.red_test: Focused protocol and packaging suite failed on missing NOTICE, GPL metadata, and validator acceptance of a notice-less archive.
results.frontend: 31 files and 260 tests passed; TypeScript typecheck passed; no known pnpm audit vulnerabilities.
results.package_validation: Release-style SDH-Ludusavi.zip validated with LICENSE, NOTICE, and the vendored pyludusavi license included.
results.cache_policy: All generated tooling state and validation artifacts remained under /tmp/sdh_ludusavi.
